pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP with all-int6 GPTQ, SP4608 vocab, and a fast sparse causal n-gram tilt as sparse auxiliary memory.
techniques: Fused Triton/CUTLASS MLP kernels eliminating large intermediates
All-int6 Hessian GPTQ calibrated via AR self-generation
C++-accelerated causal n-gram tilt acting as sparse auxiliary memory
